goal: is_set_upper_bound(s, u) = forall(x0: Real) { s.contains(x0) implies x0 <= u }
proof: function(x0: Set[Real], x1: Real) { forall(x2: Real) { not x2 ∈ x0 or x2 <= x1 } = is_set_upper_bound(x0, x1) }(s, u)
function(x0: Real) { not x0 ∈ s or x0 <= u }(z)

goal: is_set_upper_bound(s, b) = forall(x0: Real) { s.contains(x0) implies x0 <= b }
proof: function(x0: Set[Real], x1: Real) { forall(x2: Real) { not x2 ∈ x0 or x2 <= x1 } = is_set_upper_bound(x0, x1) }(s, b)
let w0: Real satisfy { w0 ∈ s and not w0 <= b }
function(x0: Real) { not x0 ∈ s or x0 <= b }(w0)
function(x0: Set[Real], x1: Real) { (is_set_upper_bound(x0, x1) and forall(x2: Real) { not is_set_upper_bound(x0, x2) or x1 <= x2 }) = is_set_supremum(x0, x1) }(s, sup_s)
(forall(x0: Real) { not is_set_upper_bound(s, x0) or sup_s <= x0 } = true)
function(x0: Real) { not (is_set_upper_bound(s, x0) and not sup_s <= x0) }(b)
function[T0: MetricSpace](x0: Set[T0], x1: Real) { is_set_supremum(distance_set[T0](x0), x1) = is_diameter[T0](x0, x1) }[M](s, diameter[M](s))
function[T0: MetricSpace](x0: Set[T0], x1: Real) { is_set_supremum(distance_set[T0](x0), x1) = is_diameter[T0](x0, x1) }[M](s, diameter[M](s))
function(x0: Set[Real], x1: Real) { (is_set_upper_bound(x0, x1) and forall(x2: Real) { not is_set_upper_bound(x0, x2) or x1 <= x2 }) = is_set_supremum(x0, x1) }(ds, diameter[M](s))
not is_set_upper_bound(distance_set[M](s), b) or not diameter[M](s) <= b
